data.raw: Add a contact form to the marketing site that matches the existing form primitives.

rendered.resources/views/contact.blade.php: Contact us — Your name, Your email address, How can we help? Send message.

states.empty: Initial render: all fields empty, submit disabled
states.loading: Submit pressed: button shows spinner, fields disabled
states.error: Validation or server error: field-level messages
states.disabled: Fields disabled while loading state is active

microcopy.title: Contact us
microcopy.success: Thanks — we will be in touch within one business day.

a11y.labels: every field has a visible label tied via for/id
a11y.focus: first invalid field receives focus on submit error
a11y.aria_live: success card is announced via aria-live=polite

questions: > Input: Add a contact form to the marketing site that matches the existing form primiti…
